@app.get("/config")
def get_config():
    # Violation: large dictionary literal defined inside the handler function
    return {
        "feature_a": {"enabled": True, "timeout": 30, "retries": 3, "buffer": 1024},
        "feature_b": {"enabled": False, "timeout": 60, "retries": 1, "buffer": 2048},
        # ... many more keys ...
    }
